[[inst_bxs]]
==== BXS

*Syntax:* bxs SrcL, M, N, ->{t, u, Rd}

*Description:* bit extract sign-extend: Dst = popcount/extract/select bits of SrcL/M/N, result to Rd/t/u.

image::../generated/encodings/enc_bxs.svg[BXS encoding,width=800]

*Uop-Class:* ALU

*Compression:* L32 (len=32)
